title: Tekken 3
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone martial artist or duelist silhouette in an arena or duel space with energy and crowd suggestion kept abstract, holding a pre-impact combat stance under dramatic light.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- PlayStation aesthetic, early 3D look, moody lighting, low-poly atmosphere, and strong late-90s contrast
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- charged, focused, dramatic

Composition:
- single fighter, clear pose, readable stance, background secondary
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid franchise costumes, avoid signature weapons or hairstyles, avoid resemblance to tekken. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid franchise costumes, avoid signature weapons or hairstyles, avoid resemblance to tekken
revised_prompt: Create an image of an abstract duel arena, with a dramatically lit lone martial artist in pre-impact combat stance casting a strong silhouette. The style should resemble the early 3D aesthetics of late 90s PlayStation games — think moody lighting, low-poly atmosphere, a stylized rendering or pixel art, clean modern interpretations of retro limitations, and limited color palettes. The mood should feel charged, focused, and dramatic. The composition should focus on the single fighter, with a simple, uncluttered background. The image should maintain high clarity and strong contrast with minimal noise, but must not contain any text, watermark, or any likeness to official characters, franchises, logos, costumes, weapons, or hairstyles from any retro Fighting game.
